tagline: Capoeira practice and lineage transmission, credentialed on-chain.
description_md: Tribo Bahia Mirim teaches capoeira to youth in Bahia, Brazil, anchored to the Bico Duro lineage. Practitioners log their training sessions through `capoeira.agroverse.shop/practice.html`; each session becomes an attested record on the DAO ledger and accrues to the practitioner's lineage credential. Donations are welcome but the platform's primary contract is experiential learning.
